title: thlaspi bursa-pastoris subsp. pinnatifolia
intro: Thlaspi bursa-pastoris subsp. pinnatifolia, also known as the shepherd's cress, is a subspecies of the Thlaspi bursa-pastoris plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thlaspi bursa-pastoris subsp. pinnatifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, added to salads, or used in cooking as a condiment, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
